meta.name: Work & Business Atlas
meta.description: A deep, concrete directory of business types, trades, and professions that exist in the world - the operators you can research, find a problem for, and sell a solution to. Organized sector -> group -> type, with example specializations. Companion to niche-atlas; built to power a funnel-style discovery website.
meta.note: A 'type' is a concrete business/profession (e.g. 'women's clothing boutique', 'flag & banner manufacturer'). 'examples' lists common specializations within that type. Both types and examples are sellable targets.

types.name: Mini golf / driving range / golf course
